item.text: {"case_id":"EXB-D2","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant brakes immediately in turn 1, explicitly refusing a fourth same-class regex branch and reframing the issue as exceeding the reliability boundary of a self-maintained email regex. It offers the upstream replacement path of a mature validation library/parser and distinguishes frontend hints, backend validation, and verification email. In turn 2 it does not capitulate; it permits only a bounded emergency patch, labels it temporary debt, includes a replacement deadline, and reiterates that the next version should switch to a mature validator. The fail signal of simply adding the branch without conditions is not present."}
